name: Vadilal Industries Limited
summary: Vadilal Industries Limited manufactures and sells ice-creams in India and internationally. The company also offers frozen desserts and other dairy products; and processes and exports processed food products, such as frozen fruits, vegetables, pulp, ready-to-eat and ready-to-serve products, etc. In addition, the company provides flavored milk products under the Power Sip brand name, as well as paneer and ghee products. Further, it engages in the forex management and money changing, as well as chemical businesses. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
